title: Stone Armor
body:
## Stone Armor

This mod adds stone armor to the game.
There is leather, chain, iron, gold, diamond and netherite armor.
Why not stone?

## Recipes

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

![Stone Helmet Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb722d5f4082a0d98da426d1a4e7118565351b9.jpeg)

## Languages

Currently, there are English and Turkish versions of the items but I am planning to add more.

## Updates

I will try to update this mod and I have plans to also make it for fabric. I have school but I will try to do it. Thanks for reading these.
